iosSourceEvidence.limitation: The operation and producer digests were collected in the isolated WP-CONTRACT-01 worktree and are pinned to committed iOS contract revision bb7ca30041dd095dc36144611bea127f0b53099d, which includes the source-proven PATCH/GET corrections. The committed iOS source revision contains the inventoried endpoint producers; subsequent workflow- or script-only repair commits do not change the producer inventory. The backend generator validates its hand-registered operations and producer variant IDs against this independent manifest, but it does not inspect or instantiate Swift endpoint factories. Exact factory and call-site membership remains an iOS-consumer validation responsibility; only six native producers currently have exact factory tests. Only 24 of the 60 partial operations currently feed the bundle success payload through the production iOS model decoder and a cache round-trip.
